style="shape=callout;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;perimeter=calloutPerimeter;position2=0.45;base=29;rotation=0;size=30;position=0.45;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px;">.Values.extraObjects is used to deploy HTTPRoute objects. Some services like Octavia use public endpoints by default to interact with other Openstack services. The cluster Coredns by default forwards requests for non cluster names to node's resolv.conf. To make K8s workloads able to resolve public names we configure resolv.conf to use the Dnsmasq that resolves the public names.&nbsp;&nbsp;</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="477.5" x="206.25" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7jABFE4BV7wavMIFIQvB-99" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;dashed=1;" value="<font div.font: .Values.extraObjects is used to deploy HTTPRoute objects. Some services like Octavia use public endpoints by default to interact with other Openstack services. The cluster Coredns by default forwards requests for non cluster names to node's resolv.conf. To make K8s workloads able to resolve public names we configure resolv.conf to use the Dnsmasq that resolves the public names.
